tmc/cpus.h File Reference

CPU management and task affinitization. More...


Defines

#define TMC_CPUS_MAX_COUNT   __CPU_SETSIZE
 Maximum number of CPUs a cpu_set_t can represent.
#define TMC_CPUS_NUM_BITS   __NCPUBITS
 Number of bits per word in the __bits field of cpu_set_t.
#define TMC_CPUS_NUM_WORDS   (__CPU_SETSIZE / __NCPUBITS)
 Number of words in the __bits field of cpu_set_t.

Functions

void tmc_cpus_clear (cpu_set_t *s)
 Clear a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_add_cpu (cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int cpu)
 Add a CPU to a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_remove_cpu (cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int cpu)
 Remove a CPU from a CPU set.
void tmc_cpus_add_cpus (cpu_set_t *s, const cpu_set_t *cpus)
 Add some CPUs to a CPU set.
void tmc_cpus_remove_cpus (cpu_set_t *s, const cpu_set_t *cpus)
 Remove some CPUs from a CPU set.
void tmc_cpus_intersect_cpus (cpu_set_t *s, const cpu_set_t *cpus)
 Intersect some CPUs with a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_has_cpu (const cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int cpu)
 Determine if a CPU is present in a CPU set.
unsigned int tmc_cpus_count (const cpu_set_t *s)
 Count the number of CPUs in a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_find_nth_cpu (const cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int n)
 Find the nth CPU in a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_find_first_cpu (const cpu_set_t *s)
 Find the first CPU in a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_find_last_cpu (const cpu_set_t *s)
 Find the last CPU in a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_to_array (const cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int *indices, unsigned int count)
 Convert a CPU set into a CPU array.
int tmc_cpus_from_array (cpu_set_t *s, const unsigned int *indices, unsigned int count)
 Convert a CPU array into a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_to_string (const cpu_set_t *s, char *string, size_t limit)
 Convert a CPU set into a CPU string.
int tmc_cpus_from_string (cpu_set_t *s, const char *string)
 Convert a CPU string into a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_set_task_affinity (const cpu_set_t *s, pid_t tid)
 Set the affinity mask of task tid to s.
int tmc_cpus_get_task_affinity (cpu_set_t *s, pid_t tid)
 Get the affinity mask of task tid into s.
int tmc_cpus_set_task_cpu (int cpu, pid_t tid)
 Bind task tid to a single CPU.
int tmc_cpus_get_task_cpu (pid_t tid)
 Get the single CPU to which task tid is bound.
int tmc_cpus_get_task_current_cpu (pid_t tid)
 Get the CPU on which task tid is currently running.
int tmc_cpus_set_my_affinity (const cpu_set_t *s)
 Set the affinity mask of the current task to s.
int tmc_cpus_get_my_affinity (cpu_set_t *s)
 Get the affinity mask of the current task into s.
int tmc_cpus_set_my_cpu (int cpu)
 Set the single CPU to which the current task is bound.
int tmc_cpus_get_my_cpu (void)
 Get the single CPU to which the current task is bound.
int tmc_cpus_get_my_current_cpu (void)
 Get the CPU on which the current task is currently running.
int tmc_cpus_set_dataplane (int flags) __asm__("set_dataplane")
 Request specific dataplane semantics for this task.
int tmc_cpus_get_online_cpus (cpu_set_t *s)
 Get the online CPUs.
int tmc_cpus_get_dataplane_cpus (cpu_set_t *s)
 Get the dataplane CPUs.
int tmc_cpus_grid_width (void)
 Get the width of the grid.
int tmc_cpus_grid_height (void)
 Get the height of the grid.
int tmc_cpus_grid_total (void)
 Get the total number of tiles in the grid.
int tmc_cpus_grid_contains_tile (unsigned int x, unsigned int y)
 Determine if the grid contains a specific tile.
int tmc_cpus_grid_contains_cpu (unsigned int cpu)
 Determine if the grid contains a specific CPU.
unsigned int tmc_cpus_grid_tile_to_cpu (unsigned int x, unsigned int y)
 Convert a tile (assumed to be contained by the grid) into a CPU.
void tmc_cpus_grid_cpu_to_tile (unsigned int cpu, unsigned int *x, unsigned int *y)
 Convert a CPU (assumed to be contained by the grid) into a tile.
void tmc_cpus_grid_add_all (cpu_set_t *s)
 Add all the CPUs in the grid to a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_grid_add_rect (cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int x, unsigned int y, unsigned int w, unsigned int h)
 Add a rectangle of CPUs to a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_grid_remove_rect (cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int x, unsigned int y, unsigned int w, unsigned int h)
 Remove a rectangle of CPUs from a CPU set.
int tmc_cpus_grid_bounding_rect (const cpu_set_t *s, unsigned int *xp, unsigned int *yp, unsigned int *wp, unsigned int *hp)
 Determine the bounding rectangle for a CPU set.

Detailed Description

CPU management and task affinitization.
